{{Quote|We priests prefer to ''avoid'' violence...|[[Unidentified priest (Red Nebula)|Red Nebula priest]], to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 50">[[Star Wars (1977) 50|''Star Wars'' (1977) 50]]</ref>}}
The '''Priests of the Red Nebula''' preached the faith of the [[Cosmic Destiny]], which was based on fate, and predetermined events. Their religion was a major part of Red Nebula society, although they experienced a [[Red Nebula exiles|schism]] when a small part of the [[Planet of the Red Nebula]] went untouched during a great cataclysm. They were all members of a [[Unidentified Red Nebula species|pointy-eared humanoid species]].<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 50" />
